# Record Label / Music Publisher Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-recording-label-record-label-site
**Vertical slug:** recording-label
**VN-ID:** VN-CRE-001
**Niche family:** NF-CRE-MUS (standalone)
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's music industry — Afrobeats, Afropop, Amapiano crossover — is Africa's most commercially successful, generating over $50M annually from streaming alone. Labels range from boutique imprints (Chocolate City, Native Records, Mavin Records, Aristokrat Records) to one-man A&R operations. COSON (Copyright Society of Nigeria) registration is mandatory for royalty collection. Artists are signed via WhatsApp DM first; formal contracts follow. Label sites serve A&R discovery, licensing, and brand partnership enquiries.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Tobi, 22, upcoming artist**: Wants to be signed or distributed. Looks for A&R contact (WhatsApp), roster credibility, and label philosophy.
- **Amaka, 35, advertising creative director**: Needs to licence a track for a brand campaign. Checks rights ownership, licensing terms, and contact.
- **Chuks, 28, music blogger**: Researching the label for a profile piece. Needs roster, history, and press assets.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero with label name/tagline, featured release (artist + audio snippet), WhatsApp A&R CTA, artist roster teaser, trust strip (COSON, CAC)
- **About**: Label story, CEO/founder profile, milestones, philosophy, COSON reg
- **Services (Roster/Releases)**: Artist profiles, recent releases with streaming links, licensing info
- **Contact**: WhatsApp A&R DM, demo submission form (NDPR-compliant), press/licensing enquiry

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Energetic, culturally proud, industry-insider. "Afrobeats to the World", "COSON Registered", "Discover Tomorrow's Stars" language. Reference specific genres (Afrobeats, Afropop, Highlife, Afrofusion). Primary CTA: "Submit Your Demo". Secondary: "Chat with A&R via WhatsApp".

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- COSON registration number
- CAC registration
- Streaming platform presence (Boomplay, Audiomack, Spotify, Apple Music)
- Artist roster credentials (chart positions, streams)
- Brand partnership logos
- WhatsApp A&R contact

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Recording session — artist in studio booth, engineer at console, Lagos studio
2. Label CEO and signed artist — handshake, professional office/lounge setting
3. Album art reveal — digital screens showing cover art, social media style
4. Concert performance — signed artist on stage, large Nigerian crowd
5. COSON certificate framed on wall — legitimacy signal
6. Streaming screenshot — high play count on Boomplay/Audiomack
7. Studio exterior — high-end Lagos recording studio signage

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] COSON registration displayed
- [ ] CAC registration
- [ ] Copyright notice on all music content
- [ ] NDPR consent on demo submission form
- [ ] Licensing terms clearly stated

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp A&R CTA prominent
- [x] Nigerian music genre references (Afrobeats, Highlife)
- [x] Nigerian city references (Lagos, Abuja, PH)
- [x] COSON trust signal
- [x] Boomplay/Audiomack streaming links
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR consent on demo form
